steps.title: Recognize percentage of percentage multiplication
steps.content: The problem has two conditions: 40% of all items are red, and 30% of the red items have stripes. To find items that are both red and striped, we need 30% of 40%. The fastest approach: multiply the two percentages as decimals.

steps.title: Multiply and identify the percentage
steps.content:
Convert to decimals: 30% = 0.30 and 40% = 0.40.
$$0.30 \times 0.40 = 0.12$$Converting back to percentage: $$0.12 = 12\%$$That matches choice B — B is correct.
